name: Metal Family
description:
Metal Family is an ongoing Russian web series. It follows the family of Victoria and Glam along with their two children Dee and Heavy, all of whom adore metal music and are judged and avoided by other people due to their unconventional lifestyle.

Sorry, I had to make this bot limited. I forgot that there are minors there... 😓
